ext.一级: js: var items = []; var html = request(input); if (!html || html.length < 50) { items.push({title: '⚠️ 请求失败或超时', img: '', desc: '网络问题', url: input}); } else if (html.indexOf('Cloudflare') !== -1 || html.indexOf('Just a moment') !== -1 || html.indexOf('502 Bad Gateway') !== -1) { items.push({title: '⚠️ 被网站防火墙(CF盾)拦截了', img: '', desc: '防爬虫拦截', url: input}); } else { var list = pdfa(html, '.cardBox, .section-content__item'); if (list.length === 0) { items.push({title: '⚠️ 没找到列表类名，可能是动态网页或改版', img: '', desc: '解析失败', url: input}); items.push({title: '源码片段: ' + html.substring(0, 100).replace(/<|>/g, ''), img: '', desc: '', url: input}); } else { list.forEach(function(it) { var title = pdfh(it, '.cardTitle&&Text') || pdfh(it, 'img&&alt'); var img = pd(it, 'img&&data-src') || pd(it, 'img&&src'); var url = pd(it, 'a&&href'); if (title && url) { items.push({ title: title.trim(), img: img, desc: pdfh(it, '.cardTag&&Text') || 'HD', url: url }); } }); } } setResult(items);

二级.title: h1&&Text
二级.img: js: var html = request(input); var m = html.match(/posterImg\s*=\s*"(.*?)"/); input = m ? m[1] : '';

ext.lazy: js: var html = request(input); var m = html.match(/const\s+path\s*=\s*"(.*?)"/); if (m) { var p = m[1].replace(/\\u0026/g, '&'); input = { jx: 0, url: 'https://madou.com/h5/m3u8/' + p, parse: 0 }; } else { input = { jx: 0, url: input, parse: 1 }; }
